Watch & Listen. Turning expertise into compelling stories that people want to spend time with. Watch & Listen is an independent consultancy specialising in audio and video podcasts. We work with people, brands and organisations to transform ideas, expertise and lived experience into stories that inform, engage and connect.

Book a free 30-minute call
Why a Podcast?

It's one of the few mediums that invites people to spend meaningful time with your ideas.

And people are accepting the invitation. Podcasts reach about 52% of Australians (nearly 10 million) each month. That's more than doubled since 2020, when 25% of Australians were listening monthly*.

So, meet your audience where they're at. Whether it's audio, video or a combination of both, podcasting creates space for deeper storytelling, stronger relationships and genuine audience connection.

Successful podcasts don't begin by hitting record, they begin with understanding. Before choosing a format, planning a series or setting a budget, we help define your audience, your purpose and the role podcasting can play within your broader communications and marketing strategy.

Not every podcast needs to include every medium. Some stories are best told through beautifully crafted audio, others benefit from a visual experience, and many are strongest as a thoughtful combination of both.

Our role is to recommend the approach that best serves your goals, your audience and your budget, not simply the biggest production.

52%

of Australians, nearly 10 million people, listen to a podcast each month. That's more than doubled since 2020.*

*Source: Commercial Radio & Audio (CRA) →

Why Watch & Listen?

Considered strategy, not a one-size-fits-all process.

We listen first.

Every project starts with curiosity. We take the time to understand your goals, your audience and the story you're trying to tell before recommending how to tell it.

Strategy shapes every decision.

From format and structure to distribution and growth, we help make informed creative decisions that give every podcast the strongest possible foundation.

Experience across industries.

We've partnered with organisations, brands and independent creators across finance, healthcare, education, technology, leadership, entertainment and the not-for-profit sector, bringing fresh thinking rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.

A collaborative partner.

Whether you need strategic advice, executive production or coaching for hosts and guests, we work alongside your team to make the process clear, enjoyable and creatively rewarding.

Services

From strategy to growth.

Strategic advice and audits on new or existing podcasts and audio-visual content.

Clarify the purpose of your podcast, where it fits within your broader marketing strategy. Then help define the audience, positioning, format, marketing and release roadmap.

Your production is in trusted hands.

Creative leadership from concept to publication, bringing together the right people, processes and production expertise.

A great podcast deserves to be heard.

Practical strategies to improve discoverability, extend the life of every episode and build sustainable audience growth.

Empowering you behind the mic and in the office.

Workshops, host coaching and tailored guidance that help individuals and teams build confidence behind the microphone.

About

An independent agency, built on a decade in the studio.

Watch & Listen was founded on a simple belief: great stories are everywhere, they just need the right brief and the right format to bring them to life.

Before deciding on microphones, cameras or distribution platforms, we start by listening. We uncover the ideas, expertise and lived experience that make each story worth telling, then shape the creative approach around the audience it's intended to reach.

Founder Nicole Goodman brings together more than twenty years in advertising, marketing and client strategy with almost a decade producing industry leading podcasts. That combination means every project is considered through both a strategic and creative lens, not simply as a podcast, but as an opportunity to communicate with greater clarity, authenticity and impact.

Today, Watch & Listen partners with people, brands and organisations to develop podcast strategy, provide executive production and build in-house capability. Some clients need an end-to-end production partner. Others simply need experienced advice at the moments that matter most.

Brands Nicole has produced podcasts for include Subaru Australia, Cbus Super, Berry Street, The Churchill Trust, Leading Teams, the University of Sydney and the University of Notre Dame. Nicole is also an Australian Podcast Award winner and multiple industry award finalist.
